goal: Build a simple Python GUI todo list app using tkinter. Features: add tasks, mark complete, delete tasks, persistent storage using JSON file. Single file app.py with a clean modern UI.

42ad941d.name: Sprint Goal
42ad941d.description: Build a simple Python GUI todo list app using tkinter. Features: add tasks, mark complete, delete tasks, persistent storage using JSON file. Single file app.py with a clean modern UI.

f0522378.name: TodoDataLayer
f0522378.description: Handles JSON serialization/deserialization for task persistence. Contains class TodoStore with: __init__(self, filename: str) -> None, load_tasks(self) -> list[dict], save_tasks(self, tasks: list[dict]) -> None. State: self.filename: str. Used by TodoApp in app.py.

17fa5f86.name: TodoGUI
17fa5f86.description: Manages tkinter UI components and event binding. Contains class TodoApp with: __init__(self, root: tk.Tk, store: TodoStore) -> None, add_task(self) -> None, delete_task(self, index: int) -> None, toggle_task(self, index: int) -> None, render_list(self) -> None. State: self.tasks: list[dict], self.entry: tk.Entry, self.listbox: tk.Listbox. Imports TodoStore from data_layer.py.
